title: Glacier
description: A Minecraft Resource pack made for Vanilla PvP (Crystal PvP)
body:
# **Glacier Pack**

**_This pack is an edit of the default Minecraft texture pack meant for Vanilla PvP (Crystal PvP)_**

<details>
<summary>Pack Features</summary>

- Small Totem Pop
- Small Totem
- Smaller Util
- Low Fire
- No Explosion Particles
- Darker UI
- Colour Themes

& More
</details>

![Glacier Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b0f4305eca15637349dd3afa355e42c148d91c.png)
